name: Apple Flavor & Fragrance Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Apple Flavor & Fragrance Group Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells flavors, fragrances, and food additives in China. The company offers food flavors, including dairy, ice cream, beverage, confectionery, savory, bakery, and snack related flavors; and fragrances for use in personal care, oral care, home care, and candle and air care products, as well as in perfumes. It also manufactures synthetic aroma chemicals; and natural extracts and fermentation natural products, as well as food ingredients. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
